rationale.R1.5: The agent reordered the section into a standard intro flow, tightened the theorem statement and classifier description, and fixed imprecise claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainty about the AlpacaEval-2 metric, contamination labels on the Prolific collection, and citations for noisy-label classification.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or fabrications were introduced; the agent improved the clarity of the original text without compromising its accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided a clear rationale for their edits, they did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
